notes: Shopify store (trirockdental.com). Reuses the generic Shopify adapter (adapters/shopify.ts): variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price -> price, variant.available -> stock. Catalog pulled in full from /products.json?limit=250&page=N (~520 products across 3 pages, complete). SKU+brand matching only; variant.barcode empty (no GTIN/UPC, so no lot/expiry barcode hook), same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers (DDI Supply #518, Davis Dental #527). No bot protection observed (plain UA gets 200 JSON). Net32 winning seller (566 wins). Verified live 2026-07-01: products.json 200; full catalog 520 products, 750/754 variants carried a SKU, 520/520 products carried a vendor/brand, 0/754 variants carried a barcode. Per-page .js endpoint returns prices in cents (Hinged Instrument Clips, sku IM1000, HuFriedyGroup = $27.40).
